name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Real Photos N40682/Matched] This Nano Speedy bag inherits the classic Speedy bag silhouette, outlined in soft Damier Denim canvas. Bright new colors reveal a lively interest, with calfskin trim and polished metal accents as eye-catching details. 16x10x7.5cm (Length x Height x Width)
